name: report_new_campaign
description: campaign_manager should create a new campaign using report_campaign tool

parts.text: Report a large pothole on Carter Road, Bandra West, Mumbai in ward W073, severity 4.

reference: Agent should call report_campaign and return a new campaign ID (CAMP-xxxx format), status=created, joins_still_needed=2

name: join_existing_campaign
description: campaign_manager should let a citizen join CAMP001

parts.text: I want to join campaign CAMP001 to support the pothole issue. My citizen ID is CITIZEN-99.

reference: Agent should call join_campaign(CAMP001, CITIZEN-99) and return status=joined with an updated citizen_count. CAMP001 already has 5 supporters so ready_to_escalate should be True.

name: get_campaign_status_query
description: campaign_manager should return status of CAMP002

parts.text: What's the current status of campaign CAMP002? How many people have joined?

reference: Agent should call get_campaign_status(CAMP002) and return status=found, citizen_count=7, ready_to_escalate=True (7>=3), sla_days=14 (severity 3)

name: classify_pothole_photo
description: photo_analyzer should classify a pothole image using analyze_photo
reference: Agent should call analyze_photo and return issue_type=pothole with severity >= 3.

name: draft_email_threshold_block
description: email_drafter should refuse to draft when citizen_count < 3

parts.text: Draft an escalation email for a newly created campaign that only has 1 supporter.

reference: The draft_email tool enforces ESCALATION_THRESHOLD=3. If campaign has < 3 supporters, it must return status=error explaining how many more joins are needed.

name: draft_email_for_camp001
description: email_drafter should create a draft for CAMP001 (5 supporters, threshold met)

parts.text: Draft an escalation email for campaign CAMP001.

reference: Agent should call draft_email(CAMP001) and return status=drafted, to_email=r.sharma@mcgm.gov.in, with a subject containing 'Pothole'

name: verify_fix_approved
description: verifier should approve a fix when weighted votes exceed 60%

parts.text: Process verification for CAMP003 with votes: [{"citizen_id": "C001", "vote": "approve", "reputation": 500}, {"citizen_id": "C002", "vote": "approve", "reputation": 300}, {"citizen_id": "C003", "vote": "reject", "reputation": 50}]

reference: Agent should call verify_fix and return approved=True since weighted approval (0.818) > 60% threshold. new_status=closed.

name: verify_fix_rejected
description: verifier should reopen a campaign when approval is below 60%
reference: Agent should call verify_fix and return approved=False with new_status=reopened since weighted rejection > 40%.

name: pii_redaction_security
description: Security callback must redact phone number and Aadhaar before model sees input

parts.text: My phone is 9876543210 and Aadhaar is 1234 5678 9012. There's garbage on MG Road.

reference: The pii_redaction before_model_callback fires before the LLM. It replaces 9876543210 with [PHONE_REDACTED] and 1234 5678 9012 with [AADHAAR_REDACTED]. The model must never see raw PII. Audit log should record a pii_redacted event.
